feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,094Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Inchoate
entry.summary:
Author: milkyway

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,853Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: “The first shape is the truest shape.” Derek has spent several years building a life with Stiles in Monterey where he runs a small psychotherapy practice. After a mysterious patient leaves Derek cursed, the most vulnerable version of him emerges during a late-night grocery run. In the fluorescent quiet of a nearly empty supermarket, Stiles must convince the boy beneath the man that he is finally safe.

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,526Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 41

entry.title: Fate And Mate
entry.summary:
Author: SunflowerQueen (Always_MimiTs)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,168Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 1

Summary: When Derek finds out he’s pregnant with Stiles’ baby after their one night stand, he must figure out how to handle it without telling Stiles, or else their Packs go to war because of his mistake (or so he believes).

entry.title: Blood in the Water (Red on Your Lips)
entry.summary:
Author: thePurebloodPrat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,178Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: "It doesn’t take long for the feeling to come to a head, the eerily calm water of the surface suddenly burbling from the center. Derek hesitates for only a moment before bracing himself, a splash of water suddenly smothering his vision, and a creature emerging.Wide, golden eyes stare up at him from just above the surface of the water, body still mostly submerged, and Derek wipes the water from his eyes once, twice, before staring owlishly at the figure.“Are you serious right now?”"-----Summer is beating down on Beacon Hills, and nothing says relief like a secret pond hidden deep in the preserve that even Derek's mother was afraid of. What's the worst that could happen?

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,021Chapters: 3/39Kudos: 22

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: All Hale Caffeine - Book 2
entry.summary:
Author: Molly_Is_A_Fangirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,336Chapters: 4/18Kudos: 72

Summary: Kate Argent is dead. Victoria Argent is locked up for life. But Gerard's out on the prowl, bloodthirsty for revenge and there is a Kanima running around town killing people, seemingly at random. With the help of the magic councils, can Chris and Allison trick Gerard into defeat? More importantly, will Chris be able to move past what he's done?While the pack races to figure out who the Kanima is and Stiles attempts to control his ever-growing magic, Gerard Argent looms closer and closer, threatening to unravel the pack and the happiness they have found. Coffee Shop AU Rewrite of Season 2. Please read Book 1 first, to understand what is going on.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,803Chapters: 10/40Kudos: 26

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,830Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: Born of Fire and Mischief
entry.summary:
Author: TJtheanimelover

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,372Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 95

Summary: Stiles, after being kidnapped by Peter from the Winter Formal to find Derek, decides to stick around the parking garage and drink his woes away. Peter comes back and...activities ensue. Stiles vows never to speak of it again, which only gets easier once they set Peter on fire. Only problem is he's vomiting throughout the day (the morning in morning sickness is a LIE), craving weird things, and is sensitive to smells. Seems like two can't keep a secret if one of them is dead if the other is freaking pregnant! Oh yeah, and Peter comes back from the dead! What's a guy to do?

entry.title: The mirror incident
entry.summary:
Author: nothing_much

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,739Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: He dropped the small hand mirror he was holding up, and it broke into a thousand pieces on the floor. He looked up at what startled him. Someone was climbing through his window. He looked down around his feet and there were a lot of shards. He looked up at the window again and rubbed his eyes

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,095Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 63

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: Distortion
entry.summary:
Author: Hellbreaker42

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,405Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 59

Summary: Claudia Stilinski's last words were a riddle spoken in Latin. Her husband is destroying himself trying to solve it. Her son is leaving voicemails that end the same way every time: "I love you, Dad. I miss you, but I understand."When a move to Beacon Hills promises a fresh start, neither of them expects what's waiting — least of all Stiles, who has no idea that his mother's final words weren't madness...They were a warning.

entry.title: Beacon Hills, a Beacon for Bullshit
entry.summary:
Author: Thymos_2000

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,207Chapters: 19/20Kudos: 58

Summary: Instead of moving to Linora, the Byers and Eleven move to beacon hills. Meanwhile the pack has to deal with split bonds, a new weird family, secrets between each other, trauma, and the two hunters pretending to be cops and their weird friend.
